message:
docs(readme): replace non-existent Series::constant with from_values pattern (br-5vg7r / fd90.111)

fd90.111: lines 1070-1071 in case_when example called Series::constant(name, n)
but no such function exists in the public API. Verified:
  grep -rn 'fn constant' crates/ → only a private helper in
  proptest_properties.rs:1103, NOT a Series method.

A user copy-pasting would hit:
  error[E0599]: no function or associated item named 'constant'
                found for struct 'Series'

Fix: rewrite the example to construct value Series the way users
actually have to: Series::from_values(name, labels, values) with an
inline vec![Scalar::Utf8(...); n] pattern. The example is now fully
runnable end-to-end (n derived from scores.len(), labels built once,
two value Series shown explicitly so case_when's pair structure is
visible).

Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
